Event: Winter Festival 2024
Event Date: 01/12/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: W6
Endless Flux Wand

Once in a while, the unit launches a magic orb at a random enemy. On hit, the orb, turns the target and all enemies in a small radius around it to stone and deals magic damage to them based on the distance it traveled. The greater the distance from the wand owner, the longer the petrification (max: 3 sec, min: 1 sec), and the greater the damage (max: 300000, min: 99000). Petrified units can't move and take 35% more damage.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
